details: Installed application reported many missing localization keys and then failed when a missing OpenFileDialog filter became an invalid filter string.
DISMTools.vbproj now explicitly copies language/*.ini into TargetDir before installer staging.
tools/build/VerifyInstallerLocalization.ps1 checks bin/Debug and Installer/files localization payloads before release upload.
LocalizationService.T now throws MissingLocalizationException instead of returning a marker string.
validate_localization.py now rejects invalid dialog filter strings in localization files.
ExceptionForm no longer dereferences CurrentTheme when the exception happens before theme initialization.
5689 source keys, 5689 language keys, no missing keys, no unused keys, no placeholder mismatch.
